description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the klakegg/hugo:0.90.1-ext-ubuntu-ci Docker image and defines a BASEURL variable set to https://palashbauri.in/. Define a single deploy stage with a pages job that runs git submodule update --init, then npm install, then hugo --baseURL ${BASEURL}. The job publishes the generated public/ directory as a Pages artifact and is limited to the main branch. No caches or additional services are used.
